headline: International Paper Announces Changes to Its Board of Directors
summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC) is pleased to announce that Katherine Collins and Lori J. Ryerkerk have been appointed to the company's Board of Directors, effective October 1, 2026.

raw.headline: International Paper Announces Changes to Its Board of Directors
raw.summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC) is pleased to announce that Katherine Collins and Lori J. Ryerkerk have been appointed to the company's Board of Directors, effective October 1, 2026.

headline: International Paper to shut packaging site in Carrollton, Texas
summary: The company said it regularly reviews its industrial network to decide how best to deploy resources for customers.

raw.headline: International Paper to shut packaging site in Carrollton, Texas

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Spotlight On 3 Materials Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: In uncertain markets, dividend-yielding stocks are popular. Benzinga provides latest analyst ratings and accuracy, for 3 high-yielding stocks in materials sector.
